executives.name: Glenn Jardine
executives.background: Mr. Jardine is an experienced mining executive with over 35 years' experience in the mining industry. He has held senior executive and operational roles with companies including LionOre, Kimberley Rare Earths, and GR Engineering Services. He has extensive experience in project development and operations across a range of commodities including gold, nickel, and base metals.

executives.name: Courtney Morgan-Evans
executives.background: Ms. Morgan-Evans is a human resources professional with over 20 years' experience in the mining and resources sector. She has held senior HR leadership roles with companies including Newcrest Mining and Fortescue Metals Group.

executives.name: Peter Holmes
executives.background: Mr. Holmes is a mining engineer with over 30 years' experience in the gold industry. He has held senior roles with Barrick Gold and Placer Dome, with significant experience in project studies and operations.

executives.name: Craig Jetson
executives.background: Mr. Jetson is a highly experienced career miner and executive with more than 40 years' experience in the mining industry. He was previously Executive General Manager at Newcrest Mining and CEO of St Barbara Limited.

board_of_directors.name: Simon Lill
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Lill has over 35 years' experience in stockbroking, capital raising, management, and business development in the manufacturing and resources sectors. He has been a Director of several ASX listed companies.

board_of_directors.name: Glenn Jardine
board_of_directors.background: Managing Director with over 35 years' experience in the mining industry, including project development and operations.

board_of_directors.name: Peter Hood AO
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Hood is a chemical engineer with over 50 years' experience in the resource and manufacturing sectors. He was previously CEO of Coogee Chemicals and GR Engineering Services.

board_of_directors.name: Paul Harvey
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Harvey is a mining professional with over 35 years' experience in the resources sector, including senior executive roles at South32 and BHP.

board_of_directors.name: Emma Scotney
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Scotney is a lawyer and strategic business advisor with over 25 years' experience in the resources, agricultural, and property sectors.

sources.source_description: De Grey Mining Limited 2023 Annual Report
